loop1.title: Transfer readiness
loop1.note: Readiness scores are not directly measured by the UPS meter; displaying default placeholder values (100/100) to maintain card structure. Real-time voltage and frequency data are bound from the asset.

loop1.title: Activity
loop1.note: Transfer count and days-since are derived from event flags (swell/sag) as no dedicated transfer counter exists; lifetime count is also derived.

loop1.title: Source Transfer — Composite
loop1.note: Showing composite transfer dynamics using available input metrics (voltage, frequency, current) and event counts; the dedicated 'Readiness' composite score and 'Bypass Voltage' are not directly measured by this asset's meter and are omitted.

loop2: 1 of 3 cards hard-failed their emit (frac 0.33 < reflect.min_gap_frac 0.34); left honest-blank per-leaf, page NOT re-routed.
